items.name_en: 🆕 【Portfoille Locky Wallet】M12148 Brown M12408 Black White Yellowish Green
items.name_cn:
🆕 【Portfoille Locky Wallet】M12148 Brown M12408 Black White Yellowish Green
Celebrating Maison craftsmanship with this new take on minimalism, the "Portfoille・Lowy・Compact". Finished with a smooth calfskin exterior and a luxurious calfskin lining, adorned with an antique-style exquisite gold lock. The interior features multiple pockets for coins and bills, along with 3 card slots that are also very attractive.
Size: 11 x 8.5 x 2cm
